delivery.raw: オンライン同期型のみ

rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary:
In this class, students will learn about the risk assessment system for chemical substances in Japan.
In order to gain a deeper understanding, we will give an overview of academic papers on cholangiocarcinoma in printing plants as specific examples.
aims: Basic topics about Clinical toxicology, especially on occupational toxicology, will be covered in this class. The toxic effects of various agents found in workplaces will be reviewed systematically throughout the organs.
goals: Be able to explain risk assessment.
Be able to explain exposure measurements.
Be able to explain the dose‐response relationship.

plan.text:
1. Clinical Toxicology: An Overview
2. Risk assessment
3. Exposure measurement
4. Dose‐response relationship
The timing of classes, etc. will be decided in consultation with the students.

textbooks:
Ladou J. Current Occupational & Environmental Medicine, fourth edition. McGraw Hill, 2004.
Levy B et al. Occupational and Environmental Health: Recognizing and Preventing Disease and Injury, Fifth Edition. Lippincott Williams & Wilkins. 2006. Ellenhorn’s Medical Toxicology: Diagnosis and Treatment of Human Poisoning, second edition. Williams & Wilkins,1997 .
prereq: Basic topics about Clinical toxicology, especially on occupational toxicology, will be covered in this class. Toxic effect of various agents found in workplaces will be reviewed systematically throughout the organs.

officeHour.name: 栄徳 勝光
